description: Create a content slide with a sidebar-left layout showing the core enabling technologies and innovations of the metaverse as a central process-flow/ecosystem diagram, with explanatory text blocks around it and a right-side text callout.

header.headline: … immersing real-world technological innovations into the metaverse they enable – Shifting the human-machine relationship into another dimension
header.sub: Core enabling technologies and innovations of the metaverse

steps.label: Hardware
steps.sub: Innovations in physical technologies and devices used to access, interact with, or develop the metaverse

steps.label: Computer
steps.sub: The enablement and supply of computing power to support the metaverse

steps.label: Networking
steps.sub: The innovation provisioning of persistent, real-time connections, high bandwidth, and decentralized data transmission

steps.label: Virtual platforms
steps.sub: The development and operation of immersive digital and often three-dimensional simulations

steps.label: Interchange tools & standards
steps.sub: Innovating and defining de facto standards for interoperability

steps.label: Payment services
steps.sub: Innovations support digital payment processes, platforms, and operations

steps.label: Content, services & assets
steps.sub: Innovations regarding the creation, sale, storage, secure protection and financial management of digital assets
